author: catmuse
description: Effortlessly grow your vocabulary as you read, with automatic highlighting and translation of unfamiliar words.

manifest.name: HiWords

name: HiWords

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### 20260607

优化 Vocabulary Library 的移动端体验：

- 精简移动端界面，隐藏重复标题、统计信息和多余筛选项
- 移动端只保留搜索功能
- 优化词本切换栏，自适应宽度并支持横向滚动
- 改善移动端大词库的滚动和加载体验

桌面端布局和功能保持不变。

### 20260607

Improved the Vocabulary Library experience on mobile:

- Simplified the mobile UI by hiding duplicate titles, stats, and extra filters
- Kept search as the primary mobile control
- Improved responsive vocabulary book tabs with horizontal scrolling
- Improved scrolling and loading behavior for large libraries on mobile

Desktop layout and controls remain unchanged.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 中文

HiWords 0.5.9 主要改进了词汇管理、词条详情和阅读侧边栏体验，并完成了 Obsidian 社区插件审核相关修复。

### 新增与改进

- 新增个人笔记能力，支持为 HiWords 词条记录自己的理解和学习备注。
- 优化单词管理视图，让词汇浏览、编辑和维护更顺畅。
- 优化词条详情视图，提升释义、例句和相关信息的阅读体验。
- 优化侧边栏展示与交互，改善阅读时查看词汇信息的连续性。
- 增强结构化 HiWords 词包支持，为更丰富的官方和自定义词包内容打基础。
- 改进刷新逻辑和界面样式，减少使用过程中的视觉和交互干扰。

### 修复

- 修复 Obsidian 社区插件审核中指出的 CSS 与兼容性问题。
- 调整 popover 事件监听逻辑，使用当前 active document，提升多窗口/弹出窗口场景下的兼容性。
- 完成版本信息更新，最低 Obsidian 版本要求为 1.8.7。

---

## English

HiWords 0.5.9 improves vocabulary management, word detail views, and the reading sidebar experience, while addressing Obsidian community plugin review feedback.

### Added and improved

- Added personal notes for HiWords entries, so you can record your own understanding and study notes.
- Improved the word management view for smoother browsing, editing, and maintenance.
- Refined the word detail view for a better reading experience across definitions, examples, and related information.
- Optimized the sidebar layout and interactions for more continuous vocabulary lookup while reading.
- Enhanced support for structured HiWords packs, laying groundwork for richer official and custom pack content.
- Improved refresh behavior and UI styling to reduce visual and interaction friction.

### Fixed

- Fixed CSS and compatibility issues raised during the Obsidian community plugin review.
- Updated popover event handling to use the current active document, improving compatibility with multi-window and pop-out scenarios.
- Updated release metadata with minimum Obsidian app version set to 1.8.7.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
新增单词释义 Tab 展示功能。

现在你可以在单词文件中使用 `---` 分隔不同内容块，并用 **标题** 作为每一段的名称。HiWords 会在侧边栏单词卡和悬停释义弹窗中，将这些内容自动渲染为可切换的 Tab。

适合把一个单词整理成「释义 / 例句 / 笔记」等多分区内容，阅读和复习都更清晰。

![hiwords tab](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/cc37efcf-2f8b-4605-b186-7ff2b39c8a55)

---

New word definition tab display feature.

Now you can use `---` to separate different content blocks in the word file, and use **titles** as the names of each section. HiWords will automatically render these contents as switchable tabs in the sidebar word card and hover definition pop-up.

It is suitable to organize a word into multi-section content such as "definition / example sentences / notes", making reading and review clearer.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- 新增 AI 请求额外参数配置，优化设置页样式，并补全文案多语言支持。

- Added support for extra AI request parameters, polished the settings UI, and completed missing i 18 n entries.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- 新增划词翻译功能：需在设置菜单启动，划词后会调用 AI 服务显示划词翻译结果，可直接加入单词本或复制；
- 设置中新增了 AI 连接测试按钮
- 添加单词时会记住上次选择的卡片颜色
- 优化了设置菜单 UI 样式；

---

- New word translation feature: needs to be enabled in the settings menu, after selecting a word, the AI service will be called to display the translation result, which can be directly added to the wordbook or copied.
- An AI connection test button has been added to the settings
- The app will remember the last selected card color when adding words
- The UI style of the settings menu has been optimized

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- 修复中文划词失效问题 [#23](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiWords/issues/23)
- 优化 PDF 单词识别 [#22](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiWords/issues/22)

---

- Fixed Chinese word segmentation issue [#23](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiWords/issues/23)
- Optimized PDF word recognition [#22](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiWords/issues/22)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### ✨ 新功能

- **全视图支持添加单词**：阅读模式和 PDF 视图现在支持通过快捷命令添加单词,并自动提取上下文例句

### 🔧 优化改进

- **AI 服务增强**：增加配置验证和错误提示,支持识别常见错误(API Key 无效、速率限制、网络错误等)
- **设置实时生效**：修复自动高亮开关需要重启才能生效的问题,现在切换后立即应用

---

### ✨ New Features

- **Add Words in All Views**: Reading mode and PDF view now support adding words via hotkey command with automatic context sentence extraction

### 🔧 Improvements

- **Enhanced AI Service**: Added configuration validation and error feedback, with support for common error types (invalid API key, rate limits, network errors, etc.)
- **Real-time Settings**: Fixed auto-highlight toggle not taking effect immediately - changes now apply instantly without reloading

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
#### ✨ 新功能

- **响应式多栏布局**：侧边栏支持瀑布流布局，根据宽度自动调整栏数，充分利用空间

#### 🎨 优化改进

- **添加单词体验优化**：添加单词对话框自动定位到光标位置 [#13](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiWords/issues/13)
- **展开/收起交互优化**：改进定义内容的展开/收起按钮点击体验
- **设置界面优化**：统一各设置区块的标题样式，提升视觉一致性
- **AI 词典优化**：提取重复的 prompt 替换逻辑，代码更简洁

#### 🐛 问题修复

- 修复新添加单词后立即编辑时的显示问题
- 修复右键菜单添加单词时无法获取文档例句的问题
- 修复 `{{sentence}}` 占位符无法正确提取句子的问题

---

#### ✨ New Features

- **Responsive Multi-Column Layout**: Sidebar now supports masonry layout with automatic column adjustment based on width, maximizing space utilization

#### 🎨 Improvements

- **Enhanced Word Addition Experience**: The add word dialog box automatically locates to the cursor position. [#13](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiWords/issues/13)
- **Improved Expand/Collapse Interaction**: Enhanced click experience for definition content toggle buttons
- **Settings UI Refinement**: Unified heading styles across all settings sections for better visual consistency
- **AI Dictionary Optimization**: Extracted duplicate prompt replacement logic for cleaner code

#### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- Fixed display issue when immediately editing newly added words
- Fixed context menu not extracting document sentences when adding words
- Fixed `{{sentence}}` placeholder not correctly extracting sentences

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### 0.5.0 - 2025-11-01

#### ✨ 新功能

- **🎉 插件社区上架**：Hi Words 现已在 Obsidian 插件社区正式上架，欢迎下载体验！
- **🤖 AI 集成**：新增 AI 配置选项，支持自定义 AI 服务和 Prompt 模板，可使用 `{{word}}` 和 `{{sentence}}` 变量获取单词及其上下文例句
- **📐 Canvas 自动布局**：支持自动调整 Canvas 卡片默认尺寸，优化视觉布局
- **📁 文件夹过滤**：支持在设置中指定生效文件夹或排除特定文件夹 [#4](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiWords/issues/4)
- **⌨️ 快捷命令**：新增添加单词的快捷命令，提升操作效率 [#10](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiWords/issues/10) [#11](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiWords/issues/11)

#### 🐛 问题修复

- **修复编辑模式下背景高亮漂移问题** [#5](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiWords/issues/5)

#### 🔧 优化改进

- **优化关联单词本的自动更新逻辑**，改进命名规则和位置管理

---

### 0.5.0 - 2025-11-01

#### ✨ New Features

- **🎉 Community Plugin Release**: Hi Words is now officially available in the Obsidian Community Plugins! Download and try it today!
- **🤖 AI Integration**: Added AI configuration options with support for custom AI services and Prompt templates. Use `{{word}}` and `{{sentence}}` variables to access words and their contextual sentences
- **📐 Canvas Auto Layout**: Automatically adjust default Canvas card dimensions for optimized visual layout
- **📁 Folder Filtering**: Configure specific folders to include or exclude in settings [#4](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiWords/issues/4)
- **⌨️ Quick Command**: Added quick command for adding words to improve workflow efficiency [#10](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiWords/issues/10) [#11](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiWords/issues/11)

#### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- **Fixed background highlight drift issue in editing mode** [#5](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiWords/issues/5)

#### 🔧 Improvements

- **Optimized auto-update logic for linked vocabulary notes**, improved naming conventions and position management

---

- 支持 PDF 文档单词获取和高亮显示；

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### 0.3.4 - 2025-08-19

- 新增阅读模式支持高亮显示；
- 新增 .md 文件解析。需要将 .md 文件放到 Canvas 中，插件会自动识别 Canvas 中的文件路径；
- 新增展开/收起。在侧边栏增加展开/收起功能，避免定义内容过长，影响使用体验；
- 新增通过颜色来判断是否已掌握。可以通过设置菜单来修改已掌握模式，现在支持通过 mastered 分组和通过 Green=4 来判断是否为已掌握；
- 修复释义内容中的双向链接和标签没办法预览和跳转问题； [#2](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiWords/issues/2)
- 优化新增单词时默认单词本设置，自动缓存上次添加的生词本；

### 0.3.4 - 2025-08-19

- Added reading mode with highlight support;
- Added .md file parsing. Place the .md file in the Canvas, and the plugin will automatically recognize the file path in the Canvas;
- Added expand/collapse. Added expand/collapse functionality to the sidebar to avoid content being too long and affecting the user experience;
- Added color-based judgment of whether the content has been mastered. You can modify the mastered mode through the settings menu, now supporting judgment through mastered groups and through Green=4 to determine if it is mastered;
- Fixed the issue where bidirectional links and tags in the definition content could not be previewed or jumped to; [#2](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiWords/issues/2)
- Optimized the default wordbook setting when adding new words, automatically caching the last added wordbook.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### 0.3.2 - 2025-08-08

- 增加 Canvas 布局设置。可以根据单词增删改和掌握的移入移出自动布局；
- 新增英语单词发音。现在可以点击侧边栏和预览框的单词发音，仅支持英文单词；
- 增加多语言支持。西班牙语、法语、德语、日语；
- 修复 Advanced Canvas 插件冲突 [#1](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiWords/issues/1)
- 修复空 Canvas 无法添加单词本问题；
- 修复侧边栏空状态无法点击问题；
- 修复侧边栏日语不显示问题；
- 优化高亮样式;

### 0.3.2 - 2025-08-08

- Added Canvas layout settings. Can add, delete, modify, and control automatic layout by entering and exiting words;
- Added pronunciation for English words. Now you can click on the pronunciation of words in the sidebar and preview box, which only supports English words；
- Added multilingual support. Spanish, French, German, Japanese;
- Fixed Advanced Canvas plugin conflicts [#1](https://github.com/CatMuse/HiWords/issues/1)
- Fixed the issue where words could not be added to the dictionary when the Canvas was empty;
- Fixed the issue where the sidebar could not be clicked when it was in an empty state.
- Fix the issue of Japanese not displaying in the sidebar.
- Optimize highlight styles.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
